top_findings.summary: The skill description includes commands to access Kubernetes secrets (`kubectl get secret perplexity-secrets -o yaml`) and collect comprehensive system data (network captures, production logs, metrics, distributed traces) which constitute excessive privilege escalation for a troubleshooting utility. While debugging complex issues may require some system access, collecting secrets, full network captures, and extensive production data goes beyond reasonable troubleshooting scope and could expose sensitive infrastructure information unnecessarily.
